phase1.explanation:
рҹӨ– **Project planning ensures success.**

**Planning steps:**

| Step | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 1 | Define requirements |
| 2 | Design architecture |
| 3 | Create data models |
| 4 | Plan navigation |
| 5 | Design UI |
| 6 | Set up dependencies |

**Kotlin-chan says:**
"Plan before you code. It saves time."

**Best practices:**
1. Define features clearly
2. Choose architecture
3. Plan data flow
4. Design UI first
5. Build incrementally
phase1.openingDialogue: Project planning. Set up for success. рҹӨ–

phase2.errorMessage:
1. Unclear goals
2. Wasted effort
3. Unmaintainable code
4. Bugs
5. Scope creep
6. Delays
7. Burnout
8. Poor quality
9. Wrong direction
10. Knowledge loss
